etymology.description: 聲(声) ('stone chime') + 殳(殳) ('hand holding a hammer or a mallet') = a stone chime being struck by a mallet
etymology.interpretation: The character 殸 represents the action of striking a stone chime with a mallet, associating the sound of metal or stone with imagery derived from both components. This visual depiction helps in understanding the character’s meaning relating to sound.

parts.english: hand holding a hammer or a mallet
